store.name: Claybody Uniform
store.tagline: Washable studio apparel for potters who live in dust and glaze

products.name: Split-Leg Wheel Apron
products.description: Clay-shedding apron cut for seated throwing with deep divided pockets and a towel loop.

products.name: Short-Sleeve Glaze Smock
products.description: Washable smock for glaze splatter, class demos, and quick cleanup shifts.

products.name: Cropped Wheel Pant
products.description: Clog-friendly work pant shaped for long hours at the wheel and clay-heavy laundry.

products.name: Kiln-Room Chore Coat
products.description: Durable cover layer for loading days, cleanup, and moving between studio zones.

products.name: Studio Hair Scarf Set
products.description: Washable wraps and bandanas for wheel sessions, cleanup, and market booths.

products.name: Glaze-Safe Glove Pair
products.description: Reusable protection for glaze mixing, test tiles, and splatter-heavy workdays.

products.name: Dust-Control Coverall
products.description: Cover layer for trimming, sweeping, and clay-heavy cleanup before errands.

products.name: Claybody Clog Sock Three-Pack
products.description: Washable socks for studio clogs, long classes, and production shifts.

products.name: Washable Studio Clog
products.description: Non-slip clogs made for wet throwing floors and quick studio-to-car exits.

products.name: Clay-Heavy Laundry Bag
products.description: Laundry bag for dusty layers, towel loops, and splattered smocks after class or cleanup.

products.name: Trimming-Tool Roll
products.description: Soft roll for trimming tools, needle tools, and small studio essentials.

products.name: Sponge Pouch + Needle Sleeve
products.description: Pocket insert set that keeps wet sponges and sharp tools separated.

products.name: Market-Day Crossbody Bag
products.description: Carry sales-table supplies, glaze-test cards, and small tools without a hard toolbox.
